details.IncidentDetail: "[2] A MCY RAN INTO RP'S VEH"
"[19] 1039 RP TO 98 WITH 302 EB JEO SR177"

"[14] 1039 RP - WILL EXIT EAGLE MOUNTAIN TO 1023 FOR CHP"

"[6] =THE SUSP VEH SHOULD HAVE DMG TO THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE TRLR"
"[4] RP AND THE SUSP VEH ARE RE NOW CONTINUING EWAST NOW AT MM 95"
"[9] INVLD IN BLU FORD PK LL --- ADVSD EX PARTNER W/ SCHIZOPHRENIA GRABBED STEERING WHEEL AND CAUSED TC'D // COP BACK -- VS MERZ"
"[8] CC HAS CALL 3333 BLUEGRASS -- UNK VEH VS PARKED VEH -- PARKED VEH WENT INTO A HOUSE -- JSO VALLE VISTA "
"[2] UNK IF 2 OR 1 VEH TC -- BLK PK "
